calls.query:
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court ca1 --docket 30929 --event evt-appeal-disposition-107510612 && find data/cases/ca1/30929 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca1 --docket 30929 --event evt-appeal-disposition-107510612; find data/cases/ca1/30929 -maxdepth 10 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca1/30929/events/evt-appeal-disposition-107510612/event.yaml; sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/ca1/30929/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca1/30929/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"r",court:["prd"],docket_number:"3:18-cv-01993",filed_before:"2019-11-02",num_results:20,fields:["id","docket_id","docketNumber","caseName","dateFiled","description","document_number","entry_number","absolute_url","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court ca1 --topic '3440 Other Civil Rights' --era 2010s --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -i -C 3 'appeal|disposition|ca1|civil rights|dismiss|affirm|reverse' metrics/statpack.md | head -n 260","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"ls -la corpus; git status --short; rg -n -i --hidden --glob '!data/cases/ca1/30929/events/evt-appeal-disposition-107510612/outcome.json' --glob '!*.git*' 'Ortiz-Romero|Pedro Ortiz|3:18-cv-01993|19-2084' . | head -n 200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md; find data/cases/ca1 -path '*/predictions/codex-baseline/*' -type f -print | sort | head -n 50","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data; git status --short; find data/cases/ca1/30929/events/evt-appeal-disposition-107510612/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T043934Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);
